I like decision theory.\n\n\\\nThink ultra long term and use time-tested processes.\n\nGet better socially: Social status, Power, Attention structure, looks.\n\n\\\nReduce the cost of living.\n\nImprove tolerance of Pain, Uncertainty.\n\n\\\nImprove long-term overall health and lifestyle.\n\nReduce active work.\n\nIncrease the fun and passive income.\n\n\\\nAttached\n\nModels\n\nMiracle of Mindfulness

## #12266
- added: 2016-12-23 22:23:36
- completed: 2019-09-24 12:46:00

Programming. Nothing build products that uses this tech. Do the thinking part of the product and business, then automate, if still left anything outsource. Learn math only after this is done. Music can go parallely.\nFor all following tech\nPriority 1\nJava, \nDatabase- transactions, all possible qureies, indexing, hints, psql, triggers\nSpring, Cloudfoundry\nCI, unit testing, \nserver maangement, load balancing, horizontal scalling\nDesign patterns and applied algo\n\nPriority 2\nNode, Javascript, Functional programming\nVuejs, Angular\n\nPriority 3\nDeep algo- That does not depend on math.\nPython\nAndorid, swift iOS dev.\nCSS
